props.name: arrowWidth
props.description: Arrow width (only if arrow is true)

props.name: arrowHeight
props.description: Arrow height (only if arrow is true)

props.name: portalTarget
props.description: Portal target identifier. Only if portal is true

props.name: closeOnClickBackdrop
props.description: Close floating on backdrop click. Only if backdrop is true

props.name: color
props.description: Static Accent color or resolved from ThemeRootProvider.

props.name: strategy
props.description: Static theme strategy or resolved from ThemeRootProvider.

props.name: radius
props.description: Static radius or resolved from ThemeRootProvider.

props.name: metaThemeColors
props.description: Content colors for meta theme-color tag

props.name: track
props.description: Should track storage change from other tab

props.name: disableTransitions
props.description: Should disable css transition when theme change

props.name: disableHeadScriptInjection
props.description: Should disable init theme script injection. This script prevent FOUC.

options.name: ignoreElements
options.description: Elements to ignore in clickoutside detection

options.name: eventType
options.description: Type of event that triggers the clickoutside detection

options.name: eventTarget
options.description: Element on which to listen for events instead of document

tags.name: description
tags.value: Detects clicks outside a bound element and triggers a callback. Typically used to close dropdowns, modals, or popovers.

options.name: returnFocus
options.description: Return focus to the previous element during unmount

tags.name: description
tags.value: Traps keyboard focus within a DOM element, preventing focus from leaving it while active.

options.name: delay
options.description: Time in milliseconds before start longpress

tags.name: description
tags.value: Detects when a pointer is held down for a specified duration and triggers a callback. Useful for contextual actions or alternative interactions.

tags.name: description
tags.value:
Moves an element to a different part of the DOM (e.g., document.body). Useful for modals, tooltips, or overlays.
 * Credits:  {@link https://github.com/romkor/svelte-portal}

options.name: initialIndex
options.description: Initial item focus when wrapper is focused

tags.name: description
tags.value: Manages keyboard focus within a group, allowing focus to move between items using arrow keys for accessible navigation.

tags.name: description
tags.value: Prevents page scrolling while an element is active by locking the document’s scroll. Commonly used for modals and overlays.

tags.name: description
tags.value: A utility class that manages single or multiple external selection state with methods to query and update the current selection.

tags.name: param
tags.value: Configuration options including the value state to manage and multiple or single selection.
